text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I can't wait until my 
next training session.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You see, after I lost a race yesterday, 
Sky was kind enough to take me to a park.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
While we were walking, I noticed all the 
flowers at our feet. The way they swayed 
in the wind made it look like they were 
waving at us.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They really helped me cheer up, both the 
flowers and Sky. So now I'm feeling up to 
working towards a comeback!
